place: Lamai, Maret, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani, Thailand
title: Four-Bedroom Sea-View Villa with Infinity Pool in Lamai
blurb: A brand-new four-bedroom villa high in the Lamai hills, where an infinity pool spills toward a panorama of jungle, hills and the sea. Full-height glass and soaring timber-lined ceilings throughout; delivered unfurnished, ready for your own finish. ฿21,500,000.
detail:
Newly completed on an elevated plot in the Lamai hills, this four-bedroom villa is built around a single, spectacular asset: a wraparound sea and jungle panorama, captured by an infinity pool that appears to pour toward the horizon. It spans 340 m² of built space on a 516 m² plot, with timber-lined ceilings, full-height glass and a generous, open plan.

The living level opens completely to the pool terrace and the view, with an open kitchen and island at its heart. Four bedrooms each have an en-suite bathroom and their own framed outlook of sea or green hillside, several opening directly to the terrace.

The villa is delivered unfurnished — a blank, light-filled canvas for buyers who want to bring their own style — with the infinity pool, sun terrace and panorama already in place. Held on a registered leasehold running from August 2024 to August 2054 — a 30-year term. Lease terms, floor plan and specification on request.
